_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: 10 μM UC1 completely inhibited the growth of an erg6Δ ira2Δ strain on agar medium
details: 10 μM UC1 completely inhibited growth of erg6Δ ira2Δ strain on agar medium
